_comment: Gloomfen Frontier – Zone 2 (Levels 16–20). Swamp borderlands filled with trolls, bog beasts, fungal horrors, and witch covens.
biome: deep marshlands, fungal bogs, witch covens, troll dens

bog_mire_slow.notes: Thick swamp mud that slows movement and reduces dodge chance.

toxic_fen_gas.notes: Gas pockets that burst when disturbed by movement or combat.

witch_hex_zones.notes: Areas cursed by covens; debuffs include silence, weakness, or confusion.

troll_ambush_points.notes: Trolls leap from trees or swamp pits with high opening damage.

fungal_spore_clouds.notes: Released by fungal beasts or disturbed mushrooms.

signature_features.the_blackfen_crossing: A treacherous swamp pass patrolled by troll warbands.
signature_features.witchlight_hollow: A glowing fungal basin where witch covens perform rituals.
signature_features.bogheart_sink: A massive sinkhole filled with ancient bones and swamp beasts.
signature_features.shrieking_reeds: Tall reeds that emit haunting sounds when wind passes through.
signature_features.the_marrow_pools: Pools of necrotic water where fungal horrors spawn.

troll_clan_marrowmaw.description: Savage swamp trolls who hunt anything entering their territory.

witchlight_covens.description: Witches who draw power from fungal growths and swamp spirits.
witchlight_covens.notes: Use hexes, illusions, and charm effects.

bog_beasts.description: Swamp creatures mutated by Void seepage and fungal spores.
bog_beasts.notes: Often emerge from water or mud pits.

fungal_horrors.description: Advanced fungal undead and spore constructs.
fungal_horrors.notes: Explode into poison clouds on death.

story_seeds: A witch coven in Witchlight Hollow is preparing a ritual to summon a swamp spirit.
The Marrowmaw trolls have begun raiding halfling caravans near the Sunken Causeway.
A fungal titan has emerged from the Marrow Pools, corrupting everything nearby.
A mysterious bog witch is offering forbidden power to desperate travelers.
The Shrieking Reeds have begun echoing with unnatural voices.
